untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit detection of 'consecutive same-direction closes (2-3 periods)' and 'momentum inflection vs prior 2-period baseline,' which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. Consecutive bar logic and multi-period relative comparisons are not supported by the allowed indicator set and operators. Volume threshold of 120% of 20-bar average is approximated via vol_ratio_20 but the 2-3 period consecutive move counter requires state tracking not available in this engine.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using returns crossing, volume ratio, and Bollinger Bands extremes as proxy for overreaction detection, but core logic of counting consecutive same-direction moves and detecting inflection points cannot be faithfully translated. Recommend implementing custom indicator for consecutive move counter or using higher-level rule engine.
